name: Jasper AI API
description: Jasper is the leader in generative AI for marketing teams, helping create quality content for blog posts, social media posts, web pages, and more. The Jasper API provides endpoints for commands, tasks, knowledge, voices, styles, documents, users, image operations, and templates.
